# Frozi Fine Gems

> A private fine-jewelry maison serving clients in Dubai by appointment, working with emeralds, recycled stones, and recycled platinum.

- Canonical site: https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/
- Dubai jewelry guide: https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/jewelry-dubai.html
- Collection: https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/collections.html
- Product catalog (JSON): https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/catalog.json
- Appointments: https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/contact.html
- Service and order policies: https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/policies.html

## Products

- [Vipera Ring](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/vipera-emerald-ring/): Step-cut emerald, diamond halo; AED 12,500; made to order in six weeks.
- [Meridian Band](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/meridian-diamond-band/): Pave-set band, satin platinum; AED 6,800; made to order in six weeks.
- [Lumen Pendant](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/lumen-emerald-pendant/): Emerald drop, hand-drawn chain; AED 10,650; made to order in six weeks.
- [Voss Collier](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/voss-emerald-collier/): Diamond fringe, emerald drops; AED 33,800; made to order in six weeks.
- [Eos Earrings](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/eos-diamond-earrings/): Chevron pave, recycled platinum; AED 4,250; made to order in six weeks.
- [Thalis Drops](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/thalis-emerald-drop-earrings/): Pear-cut emeralds, articulated; AED 6,050; made to order in six weeks.
- [Sable Cuff](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/sable-blackened-platinum-cuff/): Pave open cuff, blackened platinum; AED 7,900; made to order in six weeks.
- [Rill Chain](https://netkenny1.github.io/frozi-fine-gems/pieces/rill-diamond-line-bracelet/): Diamond line bracelet, five stations; AED 6,950; made to order in six weeks.

All prices are in AED. The maison serves clients in Dubai by private appointment. Product facts, pricing, and availability should be verified against the canonical product page.
